title: Secret exposure check
description: Check source, config, logs, errors, telemetry, artifacts, and rotation path when secrets may be touched.
body: Use when adding env vars, changing config loading, logging request contexts, building release artifacts, or handling credentials. Do not use to inspect live production secrets or reveal secret values. Steps: search changed source and generated files for likely secrets, inspect logs and exceptions for raw values, verify redaction before emission, confirm artifacts exclude secret material, and note whether rotation is needed. Validation signals include redacted test output and artifact inspection. Risk boundary: any real secret value found must be escalated for human containment.
